## Validation

- [ ] Backend tests: `cd backend && ".venv/bin/python" -m pytest`
- [ ] Frontend build: `cd frontend && npm run build`
- [ ] Manual demo checked, if UI changed

## Safety boundary

- [ ] This PR does not add autonomous diagnosis, dosing, emergency instructions, surgery clearance, or patient-facing individualized advice.
- [ ] Examples, screenshots, tests, and fixtures contain no real patient data.
